title: WhatsApp Flows
payConfirmHint: What your customer will see: a verification message in chat, then the form with payment details and Punto Pago card.
cardImageHint: PNG or JPG · shown inside the form
flowsListHint: Published and latest draft. Test attempts are removed automatically.
emptySelect: Select a Flow to see stats, preview, and sends.
sendIntro: Configure the WhatsApp message and which Flow screen opens first. Tour screen content is not edited here.
sendHintPhone: Number with country code. Only sets who receives the message.
sendHintMessage: What the customer sees before tapping the button. Does not change Flow content.
sendHintFlow: Pick the starting screen. Other screens follow the route defined in Meta.
sendPreviewFlow: ② Flow screen on the phone
sendPreviewHint: What arrives in the chat before opening the Flow.
sendPreviewFlowHint: Preview of the selected step. Internal content is not edited here.
sendPreviewFlowEmpty: Select a step from the journey to preview the screen.
openSendAssistantHint: Open the assistant with message and phone tour previews.
publishDraftHint: For draft Flows only. Activate in Meta before sending to customers.
sendJourneyTap: Tap a step to preview it on the phone →
sendUnknownFlow: Flow without a local template. You can still send it, but verify the initial screen.
activityIntro: Summary per Flow or survey: received, opened, and completed counts.
noConnection: No WhatsApp connection. Configure server credentials.
connectedMeta: Connected to Meta. Dynamic forms (e.g. payment authorization) configure automatically.
previewPayAuthOnly: Preview available for payment authorization Flows. Use «Open in Meta» for others.
emptyFlowsList: You don't have Flows yet. Tap «+ Add flow» to create one from a Meta template.
emptyActivity: No activity yet. Send a Flow from Try or My Flows.
emptyResponses: No responses yet. When someone completes the Flow, it will appear here.
detailPreviewHint: How the customer sees the message and form.

configModal.title: Flow settings
configModal.intro: Technical options. Meta connection for dynamic forms configures itself when you open Flows.

draftModal.hint: Adjust sample data. The legend shows each variable and correct format.

studio.title: Create your Flow
studio.intro: Build screens like a carousel. We translate them to the format Meta requires.
studio.presetsHint: Ready shortcuts for common cases (payment authorization, surveys, etc.)
studio.chatMessageHint: What the customer sees before opening the form (for the Meta template).
studio.heading: Heading
studio.comingSoon: Templates coming soon. Use the visual editor above.
studio.defaultChatBody: Hi, complete this form to continue.
studio.bodyPh: Explain in a few lines what the person should do.

defaults.step1Body: Use brief text. Explain what the person should do on this screen.
defaults.step2Body: You can add images or extra steps on following screens.
defaults.thanksBody: We received your response. We'll contact you soon.

preview.security: For your security, validate this payment before processing. Same verification step you know as 3D Secure.
preview.unrecognized: If you don't recognize this purchase, choose Reject and contact us immediately.
preview.chooseOption: Choose an option and tap Continue to submit your response.
preview.approvedBody: The merchant will process your payment shortly.
preview.waBody:
Hi {name},

Your confirmation is required for a payment of {amount} at {merchant} with Punto Pago card •••• {last4}.

Tap below to approve or reject. Protect your account like your bank's 3D Secure.

endpoint.needsPublicUrl: Server needs PUBLIC_BASE_URL for live-data forms.
